message.content:
@startuml
actor Teacher
participant "UpdateRollCallForm" as UpdateRollCallForm #lightblue
control StudentController #lightgrey
entity RollCall #lightgray
boundary ClassroomMember #white

Teacher -> UpdateRollCallForm : 1 // request update roll call\nactivate UpdateRollCallForm
UpdateRollCallForm -> StudentController : 2 // request update roll call\nactivate StudentController
StudentController -> ClassroomMember : 3 // checking information is valid\nactivate ClassroomMember

alt [information is valid]
    return <<dashed>>\n5 // Information is valid
    deactivate ClassroomMember
    
    activate RollCall
    StudentController -> RollCall : 6 // Request make roll call
    deactivate RollCall
    
    return <<dashed>>\n8 // Roll call update done
    deactivate StudentController
    
    return <<dashed>>\n9 // Roll call done
else [information is not valid]
    return <<dashed>>\n5.1 // Information is not valid
    deactivate ClassroomMember
    
    return <<dashed>>\n5.2 // Roll call update failed
    deactivate StudentController
    
    return <<dashed>>\n5.3 // Roll call failed,\ncheck information again
end

@enduml
